name: loader
title: Loader
description: Anti-clockwise SVG spinner matching ds-icon size/color tokens. Spins in 1s via --effect-animation-duration-long-2.

peerDependencies.frameworks: None — works with React 17+, Angular 12+, plain HTML, and any framework with Custom Element support.

size.description: Iconography size token — same scale as ds-icon.

color.description: Semantic foreground color token, or a raw CSS var reference. Same tokens as ds-icon.

label.description: Accessible label for standalone usage (live region). Omit when the host already conveys busy state.
